tluaLocalPackUnionNarrowingGuards.tlua(14,9): error TLUA2322: Type 'number | nil' is not assignable to type 'number'.
  Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'number'.
tluaLocalPackUnionNarrowingGuards.tlua(23,9): error TLUA2322: Type 'number | nil' is not assignable to type 'nil'.
  Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'nil'.
tluaLocalPackUnionNarrowingGuards.tlua(30,9): error TLUA2322: Type 'number | nil' is not assignable to type 'nil'.
  Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'nil'.


==== tluaLocalPackUnionNarrowingGuards.tlua (3 errors) ====
    declare function parse(s: string): (number, nil) | (nil, string)
    
    // Each `mustError` below asserts that correlation did NOT happen. They are the
    // point of this file: if a guard regresses, the error disappears and the baseline
    // diff shows it. A `number | nil` annotation would accept either outcome and
    // assert nothing.
    
    // Reassigning any name in the list breaks the tie between the pack and the locals.
    // The flow graph never matches an assignment against the list pseudo-reference, so
    // narrowing must be refused outright rather than trusting a stale correlation.
    local value, err = parse("a");
    err = nil;
    if err == nil then
      local mustError: number = value;
            ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'number | nil' is not assignable to type 'number'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    end
    
    // An assignment from inside a closure counts just the same.
    local v2, e2 = parse("b");
    local reset = function()
      e2 = nil;
    end;
    if e2 ~= nil then
      local mustError2: nil = v2;
            ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'number | nil' is not assignable to type 'nil'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'nil'.
    end
    
    // An explicitly annotated name opts out: its annotation is the declared type, and
    // correlation must not override it.
    local v3: number | nil, e3 = parse("c");
    if e3 ~= nil then
      local mustError3: nil = v3;
            ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'number | nil' is not assignable to type 'nil'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'nil'.
    end
    
    // A lone name has nothing to correlate with, and must not be disturbed.
    local solo = parse("d");
    local soloWide: number | nil = solo;
    
    // Narrowing has to survive a loop join: the pseudo-reference needs a flow cache
    // key, or getTypeAtFlowLoopLabel discards everything established before the loop.
    function loopCase(s: string): number
      local v4, e4 = parse(s);
      if e4 ~= nil then
        return 0;
      end
      local total = 0;
      for i = 1, 10 do
        local inLoop: number = v4;
        total = total + inLoop;
      end
      local afterLoop: number = v4;
      return total + afterLoop;
    end
